meta.title: CableCore — Network Installation & Structured Cabling in Barcelona
meta.description: Specialists in network cable installation, structured cabling and network points in Barcelona and surroundings. Free quote.

hero.title: Professional installation of
hero.subtitle: Specialists in Cat6, Cat6A and Cat7 Ethernet networks for homes, offices and businesses. Custom solutions with full warranty.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Network solutions for
services.subtitle: From a home connection to a full business infrastructure — we design and install networks that work.

home.title: Home
home.desc: Fast and stable internet throughout your home. Say goodbye to dead zones.

office.desc: Professional infrastructure for maximum productivity and security.

business.title: Businesses (SME)

certified.title: Certified Technicians
certified.desc: Our team holds professional certifications in networking and structured cabling.

warranty.title: 5-Year Warranty
warranty.desc: All our installations include a five-year warranty on materials and workmanship.

fast.title: Fast Response

local.title: Local Support
local.desc: We're based in Barcelona. Local, reliable, hands-on technical support.

process.label: How We Work
process.title: Your installation in
process.subtitle: A clear, transparent and efficient process — from consultation to certification.

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.desc: We analyze your needs and visit the space to assess the installation.

steps.title: Design & Quote
steps.desc: We design the optimal solution and provide a detailed, no-obligation quote.

steps.title: Professional Installation
steps.desc: We execute the installation with top-quality materials and perfect finishes.

steps.title: Certification & Handover
steps.desc: We certify every network point, deliver documentation and train you on usage.
